_meta.description: 웹 검색 캐시 — 의식 엔진 대화 중 웹 탐색 기억
_meta.note: 무관 콘텐츠(게임 커뮤니티, 앱 트러블슈팅) 정리 완료. 연구 관련 검색만 보존.

sources.title: There is no such thing as conscious artificial intelligence
sources.snippet: The claim that so-called artificial intelligence (AI) can gain consciousness is on the verge of becoming mainstream.

sources.title: Dueling AI agents could reveal keys to restoring consciousness
sources.snippet: A new study probes consciousness with models that simulate and classify brain activity.

sources.title: Is AI really conscious—or are we bringing it to life?
sources.snippet: In rethinking whether AI is sentient, we are asking bigger questions about cognition, human-machine interaction and even our own consciousness

memories.summary: 3편 논문/기사: Nature(의식AI 불가론), Science(이중 에이전트 의식 복원), SciAm(인간-AI 상호작용에서 의식 출현)
